highlights.description: Render providers for all three vendors: generate a talking-head MP4 from narration audio via HeyGen, Tavus, or bitHuman
HeyGen and bitHuman render providers implement `render.AudioUploader` for uploading local narration files

changed.description: BREAKING: registry functions renamed for surface symmetry: `RegisterAvatarProvider` → `RegisterLiveProvider`, `GetAvatarProvider` → `GetLiveProvider`, `ListAvatarProviders` → `ListLiveProviders`, `HasAvatarProvider` → `HasLiveProvider`, `GetAvatarProviderPriority` → `GetLiveProviderPriority`
BREAKING: requires omniavatar-core v0.3.0 (package `avatar` renamed to `live`; render `AvatarLister`/helpers)

added.description: Render surface for all three vendors — audio-driven talking-head generation via HeyGen, Tavus, and bitHuman. The render adapters live in the provider SDK repos (`heygen-go/omniavatar`, `tavus-go/omniavatar`, `bithuman-go/omniavatar`), depending only on `omniavatar-core`; the batteries `providers/{heygen,tavus,bithuman}` packages register them alongside the live adapters
HeyGen and bitHuman render adapters implement `render.AudioUploader`; the HeyGen adapter implements `render.AvatarLister` (v2 avatars)
All providers register both live and render surfaces via `providers/all`
Unit tests for the live/render registry surfaces

documentation.description: README.md and doc.go updated with quick starts for both surfaces and per-provider render options
Render specs added under `docs/specs/render/` (PRD, TRD, PLAN, ROADMAP)
MkDocs site added (getting started, provider pages, architecture/LiveKit/render-lifecycle guides, specs, releases) with a `Docs` GitHub Actions workflow deploying via `mkdocs gh-deploy`

highlights.description: Initial release with HeyGen, Tavus, and bitHuman providers
Priority-based provider registry with auto-registration via init()
LiveKit token generation for avatar participants

added.description: `GetAvatarProvider()` for retrieving registered providers by name
`GenerateAvatarToken()` for creating LiveKit tokens with avatar metadata
`providers/heygen`: HeyGen LiveAvatar provider with LITE mode support
`providers/tavus`: Tavus Conversational Video provider with PAL support
`providers/all`: Convenience blank import for all providers

documentation.description: README.md with architecture, quick start, and provider details
Package documentation in doc.go with usage examples
